title: What House Speaker Mike Johnson said about World Cup fans
shortDescription: Mike Johnson says World Cup fans appreciate the United States more than "socialists," citing visitors' enthusiasm for American culture and pride.

title: Trump said pool work would cost $2M. Price was already quadruple that
shortDescription: An analysis by USA TODAY found that the government had already committed $8.5 million to fix the pool even though Trump said it would cost $2 million.

title: Trump’s new Reflecting Pool liner cut using 'razor,' official alleges
shortDescription: The National Park Service leader’s statement gave no indication of how officials arrived at the conclusion the multi-million dollar liner was cut.

title: RFK Jr. urged Iowa Libertarian to end bid for Congress, candidate says
shortDescription: Libertarian Rick Stewart says U.S. HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. called him and asked him to consider ending his bid for Congress.

title: GOP flips Iran vote after Trump clash
shortDescription: Rand Paul and Bill Cassidy reverse Iran war vote after a tense Trump meeting, shifting Senate outcome on key resolution.

title: Democrats unhappy with Mamdani after NY primary socialist sweep
shortDescription: After Mamdani's endorsements won big in Tuesday's primaries, some establishment Democrats expressed concern. Here's what to know.

title: See the highlights from Trump's Great American State Fair rally
shortDescription: The Great American State Fair began with a Trump speech, but most headline music acts were missing from the event.

title: Warnock's bipartisan housing provisions pass in Congress. Trump said no
shortDescription: Housing provisions led by Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock passed in Congress. Trump said he would not sign the legislation until other goals met.

title: As SCOTUS lets Trump end TPS, Haitians in Ohio face 'terrified'
shortDescription: Advocates in Springfield say Haitian families are fearful of what will happen now that the Trump administration can end their protected status.

title: Judge blocks Trump mail-in voting order
shortDescription: A federal judge in Boston has blocked implementation of President Donald Trump's executive order on mail-in voting.

title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end humanitarian deportation protections
shortDescription: Getting rid of a program that's allowed hundreds of thousands to stay in the U.S. is a big part of Trump’s hardline approach to immigration.

title: Trump's mail-in voting order halted by judge, impacting fall elections
shortDescription: A federal judge blocked implementation of an executive order to tighten rules ‌for mail-in voting before fall elections to decide control of Congress.

title: Hunter Biden gives his take on NY primaries after socialist sweep
shortDescription: The former president's son said that endorsements from establishment Democrats could now be seen as damaging to campaigns.

title: Trump calls passing the SAVE America Act a “National Emergency” | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Trump wants GOP lawmakers to pass the SAVE America Act. GOP lawmakers want Trump to sign the Housing Act. Are they any closer to a compromise?
